payload.answer: Recall filtered mem_old because it is explicitly marked as superseded by mem_new. The system preserves only the current, non-superseded fact to avoid presenting stale information. mem_new is returned as the authoritative record for Sam from Goldman.
citations: Memory system principle: never present superseded/deleted facts as current
Supersession marker on mem_old indicates mem_new is the replacement record
payload.decision: mem_new retained; mem_old filtered due to supersession

entity_resolution.reason: Same entity (Sam from Goldman) referenced in both memory cards; mem_old marked as superseded by mem_new

payload.intent: Explain recall filtering decision for Sam from Goldman: why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered as superseded

memory_cards.statement: mem_new contains current information about Sam from Goldman
mem_old contains superseded information about Sam from Goldman

details: Filtering decision explained: superseded facts excluded from recall

repair_options: Verify mem_new contains all relevant updates from mem_old before supersession
Audit timestamp and reason for supersession event
Confirm mem_old is archived rather than deleted for historical audit trail
